title: rojasia bornmuelleri
intro: Rojasia bornmuelleri, also known as the Bornmueller's rojasia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the Himalayas and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. Rojasia bornmuelleri has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations are used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
